---
title: "Publications"
---


::: {.hero-banner style="background: #f8f9fa; padding: 3rem; border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
# Book "Demand and Supply Planning using R"
Learn how to use R in your daily supply chain work.
[Get the book](contact.html){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"}
:::


![book "Demand and Supply planning using R"](www/cover.png){fig-align="center"}


# planr R package

## GitHub repository

## website
